products.title: Cheirosa 67 Perfume Mist
products.description: Size: 90ml You said 67. We said…sure, why not—and made a fragrance that actually makes sense. And trust us, this one is delicious in all the right ways. Mango-first, fun-always. Limited Edition Cheirosa 67 is the layered fruity amber perfume mist you asked for (literally). The hand-drawn sunray says it all. Bright and playful, we've captured the easy, unexpected energy of 67 in a bottle. Inside? A juicy burst of mango juice, pear nectar, black currant, and vanilla crème with a warm, intoxicating finish of amber woods. Senseless? Yes. Delicious? Absolutely. Fun fact: To reduce waste and bring this mist to life fast , we repurposed unused Cheirosa 71 bottles just for this drop. Each bottle comes with a custom label applied by hand, so every single one is a little quirky, a little imperfect, and entirely one of a kind.
